page_metadata.biotools__summary: YaHS is scaffolding tool using Hi-C data. It relies on a new algorithm for contig joining detection which considers the topological distribution of Hi-C signals aiming to distinguish real interaction signals from mapping noises.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: YaHS is scaffolding tool using Hi-C data. It relies on a new algorithm for contig joining detection which considers the topological distribution of Hi-C signals aiming to distinguish real interaction signals from mapping noises.
